game_meta.name: Overwatch 2
game_meta.tagline: 5v5 team-based hero shooter. Standard ranked = point capture / escort / control / push / flashpoint / clash with role queue (1 Tank / 2 DPS / 2 Support). Stadium = BO5/BO7 round-based mode with per-round Cash economy, hero-specific Powers (4 unlocked R1/R3/R5/R7), and Common/Rare/Epic Items shop between rounds.

sides.attack: Offensive side — push payload / cap point / commit to objective
sides.defense: Defending side — stop the cap / payload / objective

game_meta.round_economy: No economy — abilities recharge on cooldown. Ult charges from damage / healing dealt.
game_meta.round_format: Best of 3 (or 5) maps. Most gametypes: 2 rounds (attack + defense) per map. Control = first to 2 captures.
key_mechanics: Role lock: 1 Tank + 2 DPS + 2 Support per team
Ultimate abilities charge from damage and healing — track enemy ults
Hero swaps mid-match are allowed and meta — counter-pick is critical
Tank: high HP, takes space; DPS: dealers; Support: heals + utility ults
Cooldown management: abilities have 5-12s cooldowns, sequence them
Sustainability: most fights last 8-15 seconds, ult chain decides team fights
Headshot multiplier: 2x damage on most heroes (some bodies-only)
Match types: Control (point caps), Hybrid (cap + payload), Escort (payload), Push (TS-1 robot), Flashpoint (5 rotating points), Clash (5 sequential points)

modes.ranked_5v5: Standard role-queue 5v5. BO3/BO5 maps, 2 rounds per map (attack+defense). No respawn fees, no shop, no Powers — pure hero pick + comp execution.
modes.stadium: Round-based 5v5 with economy. First team to 4 round wins in BO7. Each round you spend Cash (won via round outcome + kills + objective time) on hero-specific Powers (4 per match, unlocked at R1/R3/R5/R7 — permanent once picked) and stat Items (Common / Rare / Epic). Curated hero pool (subset of full roster, refreshed seasonally). Toggleable first/third-person camera.

sites.name: Icebreaker
sites.attack_comps: Winston/Tracer dive comp; Mauga/Ana brawl alt
sites.key_ult_chains: Lúcio amp → Tracer Pulse Bomb → Sojourn Visor for trade kill

sites.name: Sub-Level
sites.defense_comps: Anchor on Point with Sigma + Ana Anti-Nade
sites.key_ult_chains: Sojourn Visor + Nano for solo carry

sites.name: Labs
sites.attack_comps: Dive (Catwalk vertical commit) or brawl Server Room
sites.defense_comps: Hold Catwalk with hitscan + Server Room anchor

sites.name: Point A (Statue)
sites.attack_comps: Rein/Brig brawl for choke break, Reaper for back-line
sites.key_ult_chains: Nano + Earthshatter on the choke contest

sites.name: Payload — Underground
sites.defense_comps: Stack tank + Widow on long sightline
sites.key_ult_chains: Sound Barrier on payload final push

sites.name: Payload — Final Bridge
sites.key_ult_chains: Pharah Barrage + Lúcio amp on final cap

sites.name: Night Market
sites.defense_comps: Anchor Point with stalls cover, Sojourn off-angle
sites.key_ult_chains: Kitsune Rush + Pulse Bomb on cap contest

sites.name: Garden
sites.defense_comps: Sigma + Ana anchor with Hanzo Bridge sightline

sites.name: Control Center
sites.key_ult_chains: Dragonblade + Mercy boost on cap commit

sites.name: City Center
sites.attack_comps: Pharah-Mercy + dive tank for sky control
sites.hazard: Cars in middle = instant kill on collision; boop enemies into them

sites.name: Gardens
sites.hazard: Planter hazards = boop enemies for instant kills

sites.name: Lighthouse
sites.hazard: Water hazard on edges — boop enemies in

sites.name: Ruins
sites.attack_comps: Brawl through main, Reaper Side Ruins

sites.name: Well
sites.attack_comps: Lúcio boop comp for well kills
sites.hazard: Well hazard — boop into well for instant kill

sites.name: Sanctum
sites.hazard: Cliff hazard — boop enemies off the edge

stadium_hanaoka_clash.name: Stadium — Hanaoka (Clash)
stadium_hanaoka_clash.notes: Reduced-size Clash variant. 3 banks (mid + 2 sides). Cash economy + Power picks. BO7 format.

stadium_throne_of_anubis_clash.name: Stadium — Throne of Anubis (Clash)
stadium_throne_of_anubis_clash.notes: Sand-floor sightlines favor hitscan DPS — Ashe/Soldier with stacked Weapon Power dominate.

stadium_busan_control.name: Stadium — Busan Downtown (Control)
stadium_busan_control.notes: Sub-point only. Closed-corner geometry favors brawl + Armor stacking.

stadium_nepal_control.name: Stadium — Nepal Sanctum (Control)
stadium_nepal_control.notes: Catwalk high-ground play is decisive. D.Va / Pharah / Sojourn with Move Speed items dominate rooftop.

stadium_antarctic_control.name: Stadium — Antarctic Peninsula (Control)
stadium_antarctic_control.notes: Icebreaker sub-point. Long sightlines + bridge high-ground. Hitscan + aerial picks win the air.

stadium_ilios_control.name: Stadium — Ilios Lighthouse (Control)
stadium_ilios_control.notes: Well environmental kills matter. Lúcio + Doomfist boops + knockback items extend value.

stadium_oasis_control.name: Stadium — Oasis City Center (Control)
stadium_oasis_control.notes: Cars/rooftop verticality. Brawl + Hitscan both viable — pick the hero with the best R5+ Power.

stadium_samoa_control.name: Stadium — Samoa Downtown (Control)
stadium_samoa_control.notes: Temple high ground is the win condition. Aim items to secure it for your DPS.

stadium_colosseo_push.name: Stadium — Colosseo (Push)
stadium_colosseo_push.notes: One robot, contested mid. Brawl + Armor wins the choke.

stadium_esperanca_push.name: Stadium — Esperança (Push)
stadium_esperanca_push.notes: Plaza long sightlines feed hitscan. Ana / Soldier / Sojourn with Ability/Weapon Power dominate.

stadium_runasapi_push.name: Stadium — Runasapi (Push)
stadium_runasapi_push.notes: Stadium-first Push map. Multi-level fighting around the robot. Verticality + mobility items pay off.

Reinhardt.kit: Barrier Field (shield), Charge (engage), Fire Strike (poke), Earthshatter (ult)
common_mistakes: Earthshatter without Nano (gets stopped by Sigma stone, Cassidy stun)
Holding shield too long = ult slow
Reinhardt.ideal_use: Brawl tank — break choke with shield, Earthshatter on cap commit, Fire Strike for poke charge

Winston.kit: Jump Pack, Barrier Projector, Tesla Cannon, Primal Rage (ult)
Winston.ideal_use: Dive back-line supports, bubble for team trade, Primal Rage for ult chain or escape

Sigma.kit: Experimental Barrier, Kinetic Grasp, Accretion (stun), Gravitic Flux (ult)
common_mistakes: Barrier on wrong angle (no team coverage)
Sigma.ideal_use: Anchor with Barrier, Accretion stun on engage tank, Kinetic Grasp on Reaper/Bastion, Flux on full team commit

Orisa.kit: Energy Javelin, Javelin Spin, Fortify, Terra Surge (ult)
common_mistakes: Fortify too early (wasted on small damage)
Orisa.ideal_use: Push choke with Javelin Spin, Fortify for sustain, Terra Surge for cap commit

D.Va.kit: Boosters, Defense Matrix, Micro Missiles, Self-Destruct (ult)
common_mistakes: Defense Matrix wasted on small projectiles
D.Va.ideal_use: Dive back-line with Boosters, Defense Matrix saves teammates, Self-Destruct for forced retake

Roadhog.kit: Chain Hook, Take a Breather, Pig Pen, Whole Hog (ult)
Roadhog.ideal_use: Hook + Pig Pen combo for kills, Take a Breather for sustain, Whole Hog for forced cap

Junker Queen.kit: Jagged Blade, Commanding Shout, Carnage, Rampage (ult)
Junker Queen.ideal_use: Brawl with team, Shout for team HP boost, Rampage on Anti-Nade for kill chain

Ramattra.kit: Void Barrier, Ravenous Vortex, Nemesis Form, Annihilation (ult)
Ramattra.ideal_use: Poke phase with Vortex + Barrier, Nemesis for engage, Annihilation for cap

Mauga.kit: Overrun, Cardiac Overdrive, Berserker, Cage Fight (ult)
common_mistakes: Cardiac timing wrong (no enemy damage = wasted)
Mauga.ideal_use: Sustain brawl with Cardiac, Cage Fight for forced cap, Overrun for forced engages

Tracer.kit: Blink, Recall, Pulse Pistols, Pulse Bomb (ult)
common_mistakes: Pulse Bomb on tank only (wasted single-target)
Tracer.ideal_use: Harass back-line, Recall for escape, Pulse Bomb on cluster for ult chain

Sojourn.kit: Power Slide, Disruptor Shot, Railgun, Overclock (ult)
Sojourn.ideal_use: Slide for engage + Railgun off-angle, Disruptor on cap, Overclock for solo carry

Cassidy.ideal_use: Mid-range trade, Magnetic on tank engage, Deadeye on overtime cap

Soldier: 76.kit: Sprint, Helix Rockets, Biotic Field, Tactical Visor (ult)
Soldier: 76.ideal_use: Mid-range hitscan, Helix for chip damage, Visor + Nano for cap

Ashe.ideal_use: Long-range trade, Dynamite on cluster, B.O.B. for cap commit

Widowmaker.kit: Grappling Hook, Venom Mine, Widow's Kiss, Infra-Sight (ult)
common_mistakes: Holding same angle past first kill
Widowmaker.ideal_use: Long-range pick, Grapple for reposition, Mine for flank watch, Infra-Sight for team push

Pharah.kit: Jump Jet, Concussive Blast, Rocket Launcher, Barrage (ult)
Pharah.ideal_use: Air control with Mercy pocket, Concussive Blast for cap deny, Barrage on Sound Barrier trade

common_mistakes: No reset on Swift Strike kill
Genji.ideal_use: Flank back-line, Deflect Anti-Nade, Dragonblade + Mercy boost for ult chain

Reaper.kit: Wraith Form, Shadow Step, Hellfire Shotguns, Death Blossom (ult)
Reaper.ideal_use: Flank back-line with Shadow Step, Death Blossom on team cap commit, Wraith for escape

Sombra.ideal_use: Hack Suzu before push, EMP on cap commit, Stealth for back-line flank

Mei.kit: Cryo-Freeze, Ice Wall, Endothermic Blaster, Blizzard (ult)
Mei.ideal_use: Wall split for cap, Cryo for survival, Blizzard for forced cap

Hanzo.kit: Storm Arrow, Sonic Arrow, Lunge, Dragonstrike (ult)
Hanzo.ideal_use: Long-range pick + Sonic Arrow, Dragonstrike on cap with team commit

Bastion.kit: A-36 Tactical Grenade, Configuration: Assault, Configuration: Artillery (ult), Self-Repair
Bastion.ideal_use: Sentry from cover for tank shred, Grenade for chip, Artillery on cluster

Ana.kit: Sleep Dart, Biotic Grenade (anti+heal), Biotic Rifle, Nano Boost (ult)
common_mistakes: Nano on wrong target (giving Nano to bait)
No coordination on Nano + ult chain
Ana.ideal_use: Anti-Nade on cap, Sleep Dart on commit, Nano on tank for Earthshatter / Pulse / Visor

Kiriko.kit: Swift Step, Protection Suzu (cleanse), Healing Ofuda, Kitsune Rush (ult)
Kiriko.ideal_use: Suzu on Anti-Nade, Kitsune for cap commit, Swift Step for escape

Mercy.kit: Guardian Angel, Resurrect, Caduceus Staff (heal+boost), Valkyrie (ult)
common_mistakes: No coordination on Boost + ult chain
Mercy.ideal_use: Boost main DPS for ult chain, Resurrect on key teammate, Valkyrie for re-engage

Lúcio.kit: Crossfade (heal/speed aura), Amp It Up, Sonic Amplifier (boop), Sound Barrier (ult)
common_mistakes: Amp wrong aura (heal when need speed)
Lúcio.ideal_use: Speed-amp engages, Sound Barrier on cap commit, Boop enemies into hazards

Baptiste.kit: Regenerative Burst, Immortality Field (lamp), Biotic Launcher, Amplification Matrix (ult)
common_mistakes: No coordination on Amp + ult chain
Baptiste.ideal_use: Lamp on cap, Amp Matrix for ult chain damage, Burst for sustain

Brigitte.kit: Whip Shot, Repair Pack, Barrier Shield, Rally (ult)
Brigitte.ideal_use: Anti-dive with Whip Shot, Repair Pack on tank, Rally for cap commit

Zenyatta.kit: Orb of Discord (20% bonus damage), Orb of Harmony (heal), Snap Kick, Transcendence (ult)
Zenyatta.ideal_use: Discord tank for shred, Harmony on tank, Trans on cap contest

bronze: No role discipline — DPS + Tank both diving
Hero pick not adjusted (one-trick into counters)
Ult tracking missing — no idea who has ult
Cooldowns wasted (e.g., Tracer Blink + Recall both used on entry)
No team coordination on ult chains
silver: Cooldown rotation wrong (Tank ult before DPS)
No coordination on Sound Barrier + ult chains
Brawl vs dive comp mismatch (no swap)
No retake utility on attack final cap
Aggressive Widow holds without escape plan
Buy decision (no swap to counter Bastion)
gold: Ult economy: 5 ults charged, but no coordination on use
Counter-pick depth — knowing 2-3 counters per hero
Tank synergy with Support (Nano + Earthshatter, etc.)
Random utility usage (Anti-Nade in empty cap)
Comms on save round not helping team
Crosshair placement on common angles only
platinum: Eco round commits — wrong hero swap
Buy / swap decision based on rounds, not ult diff
diamond: Ult chain timing — 1 ult wasted per round
Off-angle pre-aim not adjusted per round
Hero swap timing — too early or too late
Tank ult vs DPS ult priority confusion
master_gm: Pro-tier reads on enemy comp, but predictable on own
Ult tracking gaps — 1 ult un-tracked per round
Comm discipline — too many calls or too few
Comp comp comp — staying static comp vs counter swap

positioning: Is the player in a trade position with teammate (within 5m)?
Is the tank pushing or holding choke based on team comp?
Are the supports peeling for the tank or sustaining DPS?
Is the DPS off-angle or playing the standard angle?
Is the player in line of sight of the heal target / tank?
Is the player exposed to multiple sightlines?
Did the player hold the ult chain position or commit early?
crosshair: Is the crosshair pre-aimed at head level on the angle?
Is the player tracking on hitscan or projectile leading?
Is the crosshair on the tank (priority target) or DPS?
Is the player aiming through smoke without info (wasted bullets)?
Is the player landing the Sleep Dart / Magnetic / Hook?
Is the player landing headshots at distance (sniper / hitscan)?
utility: Did the tank use abilities to engage or escape?
Did the DPS use cooldowns proactively or reactively?
Did the supports use Anti-Nade / Suzu / Lamp at the right time?
Was ult tracked across team (enemy ults known)?
Was the ult used at the right moment (chain or solo)?
Did the player save signature ability for the engage or burn it early?
decisions: Did the player swap to a counter when called?
Did the player commit to the cap or hesitate?
Did the player rotate when called or stay on dead site?
Did the player trade teammate's death within 3s?
Did the player engage 1v3+ without team backup?
Did the player track ult diff before engaging?
Did the player commit to the ult chain or save for next fight?

vocabulary: Ult / Ultimate: Hero's signature ability, charged from damage/healing.
Ult charge / Ult tracking: Track enemy ult percentages each round.
Ult chain: Sequential ult use for compounding damage (Nano + Earthshatter, etc.).
Nano: Ana's Nano Boost — 50% damage reduction + 50% damage boost.
Anti-Nade: Ana's Biotic Grenade — prevents healing on enemy hit.
Sleep Dart: Ana ability — sleeps enemy for ~5s.
Suzu: Kiriko's Protection Suzu — cleanses team + brief invuln.
Lamp: Baptiste's Immortality Field — prevents teammates from dying for 3.5s.
Sound Barrier: Lúcio ult — full team gets 750 temp shield.
Resurrect: Mercy's resurrect — revive dead teammate.
Earthshatter: Rein's ult — knocks down enemies in front.
Primal Rage: Winston's ult — large form, melee only.
Pulse Bomb: Tracer ult — sticky bomb 1-shot kill in radius.
Visor: Soldier 76 ult — auto-aim for 6 seconds.
Deadeye: Cassidy ult — lock-on, kills based on charge.
Dragonblade: Genji ult — sword for 6s, 120 damage per swing.
Death Blossom: Reaper ult — 360 spin attack.
EMP: Sombra ult — large radius hack + 50% HP damage.
Self-Destruct: D.Va ult — mech explodes, area damage.
Whole Hog: Roadhog ult — knockback shotgun spam.
Rampage: Junker Queen ult — speed + applies bleed.
Annihilation: Ramattra ult — Nemesis form spawns spirit damage.
Cage Fight: Mauga ult — circle barrier traps enemies inside.
Discord: Zenyatta's orb of discord — 20% bonus damage on target.
Harmony: Zenyatta's heal orb on teammate.
Transcendence: Zenyatta ult — heal aura, channels for 6s.
Rally: Brigitte ult — gives temp shield + speed to team.
Valkyrie: Mercy ult — flight + multi-target heal.
Beat / Beat drop: Lúcio Sound Barrier use.
Bubble: Winston's barrier projector / Zarya particle barriers.
Hack: Sombra ability — disables abilities for ~5s.
Stealth: Sombra invisibility.
Translocator: Sombra escape tool.
Boop: Pushback damage (Lúcio, Pharah, Brig Whip Shot).
Knock: Knockback effect, often into hazards/cliffs.
Peel: Defending teammate from dive (Brig, Mei).
Pocket: Healing/boosting a single DPS (Mercy + Pharah classic).
Comp: Composition — 1 tank + 2 DPS + 2 support hero selection.
Dive comp: Mobile heroes (Winston, Genji, Tracer) for back-line engages.
Brawl comp: Slow heroes (Rein, Reaper, Brig, Bap) for sustained fights.
Poke comp: Long-range heroes (Hanzo, Soldier, Ana, Sigma) for chip damage.
Bunker comp: Stationary heroes (Bastion, Sigma, Ana, Lamp) for site holds.
Anti-dive: Brigitte + Cassidy + Mei to counter dive comps.
Anti-Pharah: Cassidy / Soldier / Ashe to counter sky play.
Pirate ship: Bastion on payload for shred (anti-meta).
Counter-pick: Swapping heroes to counter enemy comp.
Hard counter: Hero specifically built to shut down another (Sombra vs Mercy).
Soft counter: Hero with disadvantage but not insurmountable.
One-trick: Player who only plays one hero (penalized in counter-meta).
Skill ceiling: How hard a hero is to master.
Tempo: Speed of team commitment vs setup.
Cap / Capture: Capping the objective point.
Payload: Vehicle that moves when attackers near it.
Push: Push mode robot TS-1 that pushes ahead based on team control.
Flashpoint: Game mode with 5 rotating points; first team to 3 caps wins.
Clash: Game mode with 5 sequential points; first team to 5 wins.
Control: Game mode with rotating point caps; first to 2 captures.
Hybrid: Cap + payload combo.
Escort: Pure payload escort mode.
Cooldown / CD: Time before an ability can be used again.

detect_cues: Cash counter visible in HUD (top-left or scoreboard area)
Round X of 7 indicator (not round 1 of 2)
Power-pick screen between rounds (4 cards displayed)
Item shop UI between rounds (Common / Rare / Epic tiered)
Round-result splash showing Cash earned + breakdown
Build / Loadout panel in spawn showing equipped Powers and Items
Limited hero pool in hero-select (~40 heroes, not full ~45+ roster)

round_economy.win_cash: Round win pays ~3,500–4,500 Cash (scales with match length + individual contribution)
round_economy.loss_cash: Round loss pays ~2,500–3,000 Cash (loss bonus is intentional anti-snowball)
round_economy.bonuses: Eliminations ~100–250 each, objective time ~10/sec, Round MVP +500, assists ~50 each
round_economy.spend_window: Item shop open ~30s between rounds. Powers picked at end of rounds 1, 3, 5, 7.

stadium_mode.power_progression: R1 Power = baseline (kit enhancement). R3 = synergy multiplier. R5 = situational counter. R7 = win-condition. Once locked, Powers cannot be swapped — wrong R1 pick compounds through R7.

item_categories.weapon_power: Percent boost to primary-fire damage. Best for hitscan DPS (Soldier, Cassidy, Ashe, Sojourn). Weak on tanks due to hero-tag damage reduction.
item_categories.ability_power: Percent boost to ability damage / heal / utility. Best for ability-driven heroes (Ana, Sigma, Mei, Junkrat, Symmetra).
item_categories.armor_health: Flat HP or armor layer. Armor reduces incoming damage 30% on shots <=10 dmg. Best for tanks and brawl DPS.
item_categories.cooldown_reduction: Percent off ability cooldowns. Best for cooldown-driven heroes (Brigitte, Ana, Lúcio).
item_categories.life_steal: Heal for percent of damage dealt. Best for sustain DPS (Reaper, Mauga, Mei).
item_categories.move_speed: Base movement boost. Best for flank DPS (Reaper, Sombra) and mobile supports.

coaching_signals: Cash <=500 mid-round means the player overspent and is locked into the current build.
R1 Power that does not match the Item stack (e.g. damage Power but no Weapon Power items) = wasted synergy — call it out.
Tank with stacked Weapon Power items = misallocated. Tanks should prioritize Armor + Cooldown.
Round 5+ with no Epic items = either threw rounds (low Cash) or hoarded — both lose late game.
Third-person camera reveals positioning that first-person hides. Read crosshair as best-effort, not literal aim.
common_mistakes: Picking the highest-damage R1 Power without checking if the hero scales with affordable items.
Buying 4–5 Common items past Round 3 instead of saving for a Rare. Diminishing returns hit hard past 3 stacks of one stat.
Tanks buying Weapon Power. Hero-tag DR makes it the worst dollar spend per round.
Saving Cash for Round 7 then leaving 2,000+ unspent. Unspent Cash is forfeited at match end.
Throwing Round 1 intentionally for loss bonus. Comp + Power lead from a R1 win outweighs ~1,000 Cash.

role_priorities.tank: Armor > Cooldown Reduction > Ability Power (or Weapon Power for Mauga only). Powers should always extend survivability.
role_priorities.dps: Weapon Power > Life Steal (brawl) OR Cooldown Reduction (ability-heavy) > Armor. Pick one damage vector, stack toward it.
role_priorities.support: Ability Power > Cooldown Reduction > Armor. Pick CC/heal-scaling Powers, not raw-damage Powers.
